title: 53rd Maó Music Festival
location: Teatre Principal de Maó, Claustre del Museu de Menorca y Parc Rubió i Tudurí
description: The island's longest-running classical music festival, organised by Joventuts Musicals de Maó, devotes its 53rd edition to Spanish classical music under the title 'Nights of Music in the Gardens of Spain', marking the 150th anniversary of Manuel de Falla's birth. It opens on 3 July with a talk at the Ateneu de Maó and gathers nine concerts between 9 July and 26 August, at 9 pm.
